SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 05

JUDGE VONASEK, M.HOLMES,CSR, K.LEE,CLERK 03:50PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ARNOLD EVJE FOR THE PLTF AND JACQUELINE M. KRAMER FOR DEFENDANT CONNIE JACKSON ONLY. ALL OTHER DEFTS ARE NOT PRESENT. CASE IS SETTLED AS TO CONNIE JACKSON ONLY AND SHALL REMAIN ON THE TRIAL CALENDAR FOR MARCH 6, 1995 FOR REMAINING DEFTS. TERMS ON THE RECORD.
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 03
#3 JUDGE CHOPPELAS - C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT; DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT; PRIMA FACIE CASE PRESENTED; COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STELL, JERRY JACKSON, CONNIE MIXON, MESHELLA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 WEBSTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,133.22 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,618.22, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. RENT, DAMAGES, ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS WAIVED AGAINST CONNIE JACKSON IF SHE VACATES ON OR BEFORE 3/28/95.
